title: Testing, Quality Control, Defect Management and CI
objective: 建立完整的软件测试体系、质量控制、缺陷管理计划和 CI 验证流水线，使双端系统和内容管线具备可持续演进的工程保障

tasks.title: Expand parser and manifest unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover source parsing, publish manifest validation and private/public filtering
Malformed source records fail safely with actionable messages
Tests can run locally without network access
tasks.notes: Keep network-dependent GitHub tests mocked or fixture-based.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for source to public projection
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests cover source sync, manifest selection, search index and graph generation
Draft or review content cannot appear in public projection artifacts
Fixtures represent Obsidian-scale source inputs without committing private content
tasks.notes: Use small synthetic fixtures for speed.

tasks.title: Add end-to-end tests for admin and public flows
acceptance_criteria: E2E tests cover admin preview, whitelist selection and user surface visibility
Tests verify public pages do not expose admin controls
Failure output is useful for regression triage
tasks.notes: Use local browser automation only; do not hit production services.

tasks.title: Define visual regression and accessibility gates
acceptance_criteria: Critical pages have desktop and mobile screenshot baselines or documented visual checks
Accessibility checks cover navigation, headings, color contrast and keyboard reachability
Graph and preview-heavy pages have explicit render gates
tasks.notes: Avoid brittle visual tests where content is intentionally dynamic.

tasks.title: Create defect management plan
acceptance_criteria: Defect severity, triage flow and ownership rules are documented
Bug templates cover UI, API, content leak, build failure and deployment failure categories
Content privacy leaks are treated as high severity incidents
tasks.notes: This is process documentation and templates, not a hosted issue migration.

tasks.title: Add CI validation pipeline
acceptance_criteria: CI runs install, PRD validation, unit tests and build checks
CI never deploys, uploads, pushes generated content or mutates external services
CI artifacts and logs are sufficient for human release review
tasks.notes: Deployment remains S12 and requires explicit human L4 approval.
